name: milo-pro
description: Mini ERP for repair shop and retail management

scripts.start:legacy: set FRONTEND_MODE=legacy&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.start:react: set FRONTEND_MODE=react&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.start:auto: set FRONTEND_MODE=auto&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.dev:backend:legacy: set FRONTEND_MODE=legacy&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.dev:backend:react: set FRONTEND_MODE=react&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.dev:backend:auto: set FRONTEND_MODE=auto&& npm run build:backend && node backend/dist/server.js
scripts.check:syntax: node --check server.js && node --check database.js && node --check auth.js && node --check routes/auth.js && node --check routes/categories.js && node --check routes/customers.js && node --check routes/dashboard.js && node --check routes/deviceOptions.js && node --check routes/products.js && node --check routes/purchases.js && node --check routes/repairs.js && node --check routes/reports.js && node --check routes/sales.js && node --check routes/settings.js && node --check routes/woocommerce.js && node --check services/woo-order-client.js && node --check services/woo-order-importer.js && node --check services/woo-order-sync.js && node --check scripts/woo-sync-orders.js && node --check public/js/api.js && node --check public/js/app.js && node --check public/js/auth.js && node --check public/js/router.js && node --check public/js/pages/customers.js && node --check public/js/pages/dashboard.js && node --check public/js/pages/merchandise.js && node --check public/js/pages/ncProveedor.js && node --check public/js/pages/ncQuery.js && node --check public/js/pages/products.js && node --check public/js/pages/purchaseQuery.js && node --check public/js/pages/repairs.js && node --check public/js/pages/reports.js && node --check public/js/pages/sales.js && node --check public/js/pages/settings.js && node --check public/js/pages/supplierPayments.js && node --check public/js/pages/suppliers.js && node --check public/js/pages/users.js
scripts.test: node tests/woo-order-sync.test.js && node tests/woo-order-config.test.js && node tests/woocommerce-routes.test.js
